calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Personal Property (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz (Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Katz presented oral argument to support his positions with regard to the securities accounts being an asset of the Trust. The Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Personal Property is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
